fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies one of two values, depending on the value in the Type field.

fields.name: Sales Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies one of the following values, depending on the value in the Sales Type field.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the sales line discount price.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which the sales line discount is valid.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Sales Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales type of the sales line discount. The sales type defines whether the sales price is for an individual customer, customer discount group, all customers, or for a campaign.

fields.name: Minimum Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum quantity that the customer must purchase in order to gain the agreed discount.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to which the sales line discount is valid.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of item that the sales discount line is valid for. That is, either an item or an item discount group.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.
